chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-5240 of 2023 _______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of Misc. No.24092/2023 2. For hearing of main case 07.08.2025 Ms. Humaira Jatoi, advocate for SBCA Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is almost three years ago. It was last taken up on 30.10.2023. During this period, the petitioner has not made any serious effort to have this petition fixed for hearing. Even today, despite the lapse of three years, the petitioner is absent without any intimation. Prima facie, the petition also appears to be not maintainable, as the petitioner has an alternate remedy before the Anti-Encroachment Tribunal. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s), if any. Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
